title: denhamia fournieri
intro: Denhamia fournieri, also known as the Queensland laurel, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cunoniaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Denhamia fournieri include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and its leaves and bark are commonly used in traditional medicine.
